texts.InactiveUserReminderWarning: We have noticed that your account has been inactive for an extended period. To keep your account active and secure, we recommend logging in.
texts.InactiveUserReminderAction: If you wish to keep your account, please log in before
texts.InactiveUserReminderClosure: If you no longer need this account, no action is required. However, please note that if you do not log in before
texts.InactiveUserReminderInactive: , your account will be deactivated, and you will not be able to log in.
texts.InactiveUserDeactivationNotice: This notice is to inform you that, due to
texts.InactiveUserDeactivationWarning: consecutive days of inactivity, your account has been deactivated. Your data is still stored but inaccessible. If needed, please contact us before
texts.InactiveUserDeactivationAction: to restore your account. If not addressed in time, your account will be permanently deleted.
texts.NoReactionClosure: If you do not wish to reactivate your account, no further action is required. After the reactivation period ends, your account will be automatically queued for deletion.
texts.AutomatedNotification: This is an automated notification. Please do not reply directly to this email.
texts.InactiveUserDeletionNotice: Due to prolonged inactivity and failure to respond to previous notices, your account has been permanently deleted. All data associated with you has been removed from the platform.
texts.CreateNewAccountInstructions: To continue using the service, please
